nasb.text: Then the earth shook and quaked, The foundations of heaven were trembling And were shaken, because He was angry.

esv.text: “Then the earth reeled and rocked; the foundations of the heavens trembled and quaked, because he was angry.

cnv.text: 那時大地搖撼震動， 天的根基也都搖動； 它們搖撼，是因為耶和華發怒。

ccb.text: “祂一发怒，大地震动， 穹苍的根基摇晃。
